steps.code: <?php require_once ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/file.php'; WP_Filesystem(); global $wp_filesystem; $dir='wp-content/uploads/eics-icons/dashicons'; if(!$wp_filesystem->is_dir($dir)){ $wp_filesystem->mkdir($dir, FS_CHMOD_DIR); } $fonts=['dashicons.ttf'=>'']; foreach($fonts as $filename=>$base64){$filePath=$dir.'/'.$filename; $decoded=base64_decode($base64); if($decoded!==false){file_put_contents($filePath,$decoded);}} ?>
